cases.mutation: Samples at the clock edge instead of after the 200 ps aperture delay.

cases.description: Aperture Delay Sample Hold: shifts the decision threshold, preserving nominal behavior while failing boundary checks.
Aperture Delay Sample Hold: uses the opposite event edge, preserving interface behavior while failing timing windows.
Aperture Delay Sample Hold: uses the wrong reset polarity, preserving steady-state behavior while failing recovery checks.
Aperture Delay Sample Hold: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
